sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: [8-K] CERUS CORP Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Cerus Corporation reported strong financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with total revenue increasing by 23% to $59.9 million and product revenue by 24% to $53.7 million. The company significantly narrowed its net loss to $1.6 million and saw increased demand for its INTERCEPT Fibrinogen Complex. Based on this performance, Cerus raised its full-year 2026 product revenue guidance to a range of $227 million to $231 million.

feed.title: CalciMedica (CALC) details 2025 executive pay, ownership and $20.4M raise
feed.summary: CalciMedica (CALC) has filed an amendment to its annual report (10-K/A), detailing 2025 executive compensation, board governance, ownership stakes, and related-party transactions, as well as a $20.4 million private placement from 2024. The filing specifies executive pay, significant equity awards, and severance policies, with CEO A. Rachel Leheny receiving $895,410 in total compensation for 2025. It also updates information on major shareholders and outlines fees paid to the independent auditor.

feed.title: BTC Digital Delays 20-F Filing Amid Wider Losses
feed.summary: BTC Digital (BTCT) has announced a delay in filing its 2025 annual Form 20-F due to the need for more time to finalize financial statements and audit procedures. Despite an estimated 20% revenue growth for 2025, the company anticipates a significantly wider net loss of $8.5 million to $9.5 million, up from $2.0 million the previous year, primarily due to increased operating expenses. The filing is expected within the standard 15-day SEC extension window.

feed.title: Coastal Financial (NASDAQ:CCB) Price Target Cut to $120.00 by Analysts at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen has lowered its price target for Coastal Financial (NASDAQ:CCB) from $145.00 to $120.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 58.9% from its current share price. This revision follows Coastal Financial's Q1 earnings report, which missed analyst expectations with $0.78 EPS and $56.3 million revenue. Despite the target cut and mixed analyst coverage, the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $133.25.

feed.title: BV financial director Joseph Galli sells $120,751 in stock
feed.summary: BV Financial director Joseph S. Galli sold 5,992 shares of the company's common stock for over $120,000 on April 28, 2026. These transactions, conducted through an IRA, leave Mr. Galli with substantial indirect and direct holdings in the company, including vested and unvested stock options. The company's stock is trading near its 52-week high after a 28% gain over the past year.

feed.title: CAVA to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 19, 2026
feed.summary: CAVA Group, Inc. (NYSE: CAVA) will host a conference call on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, at 5:00 PM Eastern Time to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results and provide a business update. A press release detailing the financial results will be released at approximately 4:10 PM Eastern Time on the same day. The conference call will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website, investor.cava.com, with a recorded version available for up to one year.

feed.title: CBIZ Inc. Earnings Call Signals Cautious Upside
feed.summary: CBIZ Inc. reported its Q1 earnings, highlighting a cautiously optimistic outlook with revenue growth, higher EPS, and strong free cash flow. The company expects margin expansion and deleveraging through AI, offshoring, and a unified operating model, despite some short-term softness and integration-related hurdles. Management raised its full-year EPS outlook and reaffirmed revenue and EBITDA targets, positioning the firm for long-term growth.

feed.title: Cable One (NYSE: CABO) Q1 2026 profit surges on asset sale gains
feed.summary: Cable One (CABO) reported a significant jump in net income for Q1 2026 to $35.8 million, up from $2.6 million in Q1 2025, primarily due to a $26.6 million gain from selling fiber-to-the-tower contract rights and lower equity investment losses. Despite this profit surge, total revenues declined by 7.3% year-over-year to $353.0 million, and Adjusted EBITDA fell to $183.3 million, reflecting pressure on core operating profitability from declining residential data and video subscribers. The company also actively managed its liabilities by repaying $90.6 million in debt and refinancing $575.0 million of convertible notes.

feed.title: [Form 4] BETTERWARE DE MEXICO, S.A.P.I. DE C.V Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: BETTERWARE DE MEXICO, S.A.P.I. DE C.V.'s CEO, Andres Campos, reported an open-market purchase of 10,000 Ordinary Shares at a weighted average price of $16.8062 per share. These shares are held indirectly through C8A Holdings S.A. de C.V. Subsequent to the transaction, Campos indirectly holds 50,000 shares via C8A Holdings and directly holds 180,000 shares.

feed.title: BlackRock Portfolio Management reports 34.7M WPP shares (WPP: LON) Amendment
feed.summary: BlackRock Portfolio Management LLC has reported a beneficial ownership of 34,674,236 shares of WPP plc common stock, representing a 3.2% stake in the company. This amendment filing (Schedule 13G/A) indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 29,274,062 shares and sole dispositive power over all 34,674,236 shares. The filing was signed on April 30, 2026, and aggregates positions from various BlackRock Reporting Business Units.

feed.title: Baytex posts first-quarter results May 7, then holds a webcast May 8
feed.summary: Baytex Energy (TSX/NYSE: BTE) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results after market close on Thursday, May 7, 2026. A conference call and webcast to discuss these results will be held on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. MDT (11:00 a.m. EDT). Investors can find registration, dial-in numbers, and the live webcast link on the company's website, with an archived recording available after the event.

feed.title: BRW estimates April payout came entirely from income, not capital
feed.summary: Saba Capital Income & Opportunities Fund (NYSE: BRW) announced that its monthly distribution for April 2026, amounting to $0.085 per share, was entirely sourced from net investment income. The fund explicitly stated that 100% of this distribution came from income, with no portion attributed to net realized capital gains or return of capital. This notice is provided to shareholders as an estimate, with the final tax reporting details to be determined at year-end.

feed.title: Beazer Homes USA : Second Quarter 2026 Investor Presentation
feed.summary: Beazer Homes USA has released its investor presentation for the second quarter of 2026, highlighting solid execution despite a challenging environment. The company reported community count, sales pace, ASP, and gross margin generally in line with expectations, with anticipated margin improvements. Strategic actions include increased liquidity, share repurchases at a discount to book value, and a focus on efficient land spending and community count growth, alongside efforts to deleverage and boost book value per share.

feed.title: BRIEF-Beazer Homes USA Q2 Homebuilding Revenue USD 397.7 Million
feed.summary: Beazer Homes USA reported its Q2 homebuilding revenue reached $397.7 million. This brief financial update was provided by Refinitiv and highlights a key financial metric for the company.

feed.title: Beazer Homes USA Q2 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Beazer Homes USA (NYSE: BZH) reported its Q2 2026 earnings, meeting expectations for community count, sales pace, ASP, and gross margin. Despite challenges like higher mortgage rates and energy costs, the company increased liquidity by expanding its revolver and repurchased over a million shares. Management remains focused on long-term goals of profitability growth, community count increases, and efficient capital allocation, emphasizing their strategy of offering energy-efficient homes as a competitive advantage.

feed.title: Beazer Homes (NYSE: BZH) swings to loss as Q2 2026 revenue and margins decline
feed.summary: Beazer Homes (NYSE: BZH) reported a net loss of $0.9 million in Q2 2026, a significant downturn from a net income of $12.8 million in the prior year, as total revenue declined to $409.8 million from $565.3 million. The company's homebuilding gross margin compressed to 12.0% from 15.1%, primarily due to higher price concessions, closing-cost incentives, and inventory impairments. Beazer Homes also increased its use of a credit facility, raising total debt to $1.23 billion, while accelerating share repurchases of $45.1 million year-to-date.

feed.title: 23,000 shares proposed for sale — Popular (NASDAQ: BPOP) Form 144 notice
feed.summary: A Form 144 notice indicates a proposed sale of 23,000 shares of Popular (NASDAQ: BPOP) common stock by Popular Securities, LLC, on behalf of Alfonso F. Ballester. These shares were acquired through inheritance, and the filing also reveals a prior sale of 2,360 shares by Alejandro M. Ballester for $312,700 on January 30, 2026. This notice provides transparency regarding potential future stock sales, which is important for market participants.

feed.title: Merger could leave SOBR Safe (NASDAQ: SOBR) holders with about 2%
feed.summary: SOBR Safe (NASDAQ: SOBR) reported a Q1 2026 net loss of $2.29 million on revenues of $79,003, with significant operating costs leading to a substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern. The company has announced a proposed all-stock merger with Clean World Ventures, Inc., which, if approved, would result in existing SOBR stockholders owning only about 2% of the combined entity. This highly dilutive merger is presented as a strategic lifeline given SOBR's financial struggles and Nasdaq listing compliance issues.

feed.title: Reading International (NASDAQ: RDI) expands 2025 governance and pay disclosures
feed.summary: Reading International, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDI) filed an Amendment No. 2 to its 2025 annual report, providing detailed disclosures on directors, executive officers, corporate governance, compensation, equity plans, security ownership, and related-party transactions. The report highlights the company's controlled-company board structure, a shift to equity-based incentives instead of cash bonuses for executives due to liquidity pressures, and a 2025 related-party real estate acquisition. It also outlines key financial figures for the year, including CEO compensation and audit fees.

feed.title: Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ:BSVN) Sees Significant Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ:BSVN) experienced a significant 18.1% decline in short interest in April, dropping to 39,425 shares. The company recently surpassed earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.25 against an estimated $1.01 and revenue of $26.16 million versus $23.63 million. Analysts generally maintain a "Buy" rating for BSVN with a consensus price target of $54.50.

feed.title: Leadership transition and pay plans at Black Stone Minerals (NYSE: BSM) detailed in 2026 proxy
feed.summary: Black Stone Minerals is soliciting proxies for its 2026 annual meeting on June 11, 2026, where unitholders will vote on director elections, auditor ratification, and executive compensation. The proxy details a CEO succession plan effective January 1, 2026, with Thomas L. Carter, Jr. transitioning to Executive Chairman and Fowler T. Carter and H. Taylor DeWalch becoming Co-Chief Executive Officers. Executive compensation emphasizes performance-based incentives tied to adjusted EBITDAX and long-term equity, with the 2023 long-term incentives paying out at 92.36% of target.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 5.09% of Transcat (NASDAQ: TRNS) — 475,732 shares
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a beneficial ownership of 475,732 shares, or 5.09%, of Transcat Inc (NASDAQ: TRNS) common stock as of March 31, 2026, as disclosed in a Schedule 13G filing. Vanguard exercises sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 68,571 shares. This significant passive stake indicates that Vanguard views Transcat as an investment rather than an attempt to influence control, with holdings managed across various Vanguard funds and accounts.

feed.title: A Look at BWX Technologies Inc (BWXT) After 4.0% Gain -- GF Value $130.18 vs Price $216.39
feed.summary: BWX Technologies Inc (BWXT) shares saw a 4.0% gain, reaching $216.39, but GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is 66.2% overvalued at $130.18. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 91/100, driven by excellent growth and profitability, the valuation score is low, and insiders have been net sellers, suggesting caution for investors. The current P/E ratio is significantly above historical levels, reinforcing the overvaluation concern.

feed.title: Full Transcript: DMC Glb Q1 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: DMC Global reported a 15% year-over-year decline in first-quarter consolidated sales to $135.6 million, with adjusted EBITDA of $3.9 million, primarily due to macroeconomic challenges and supply chain disruptions. Despite the downturn, the company's order backlog reached a 15-year high, signaling potential future growth. Management provided a second-quarter sales guidance of $148 to $158 million and adjusted EBITDA of $6 to $8 million, anticipating improvements across all business segments driven by stronger order activity and project shipments.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 5.17% stake in Terreno Realty (TRNO) via Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.17% beneficial ownership stake in Terreno Realty (TRNO) through a Schedule 13G filing. This amounts to 5,501,195 shares, with Vanguard holding sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 863,210 shares. The filing, signed by Ashley Grim on April 30, 2026, indicates this ownership is on behalf of various Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: Bluejay Diagnostics (NASDAQ: BJDX) seeks reverse split and major stock plan expansion
feed.summary: Bluejay Diagnostics (NASDAQ: BJDX) is requesting shareholder approval for a reverse stock split at a ratio between 1-for-2 and 1-for-20, aimed at maintaining its Nasdaq listing by increasing its stock price. The company also seeks to expand its 2021 Stock Plan by 600,000 shares to increase capacity for future equity awards. These proposals will be voted on at the annual meeting on June 9, 2026, alongside the election of five directors and the ratification of Wolf & Company, P.C. as the independent auditor.

feed.title: Price-Driven Insight from (BRZU) for Rule-Based Strategy

It details three AI-generated trading strategies (Position, Momentum Breakout, Risk Hedging) with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels, and highlights an exceptional 46.1:1 risk-reward setup. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal analysis indicating support and resistance levels for different time horizons.

feed.title: Board, pay and ownership reshaped at Boston Omaha (NYSE: BOC)
feed.summary: Boston Omaha Corporation filed an amendment to its annual report to provide comprehensive Part III information on directors, executive compensation, ownership, related-party policies, and auditor fees. The company detailed changes in CEO Adam Peterson's salary, independent director compensation, and the outstanding Class A and Class B common stock. It also outlined its corporate governance, risk oversight, and related-party transaction policies, along with executive compensation figures for 2024 and 2025.

feed.title: Tejon Ranch will post Q1 results before market open on May 7
feed.summary: Tejon Ranch (NYSE: TRC) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on May 7, 2026. The company will also host a conference call the same day at 5:00 p.m. ET, featuring President & CEO Matt Walker and CFO Robert Velasquez. Investors can submit questions via email by 2:00 p.m. ET on May 7, 2026, and a webcast of the call will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: Tejon Ranch (NYSE: TRC) plans Q1 2026 results call on May 7
feed.summary: Tejon Ranch Co. (NYSE: TRC) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on May 7, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, featuring President & CEO Matt Walker and CFO Robert Velasquez, to discuss their recent initiatives and results. Investors can submit questions via email in advance, and the call will be accessible via telephone and an audio webcast, with a replay available for one year.

feed.title: Braiin (Nasdaq: BRAI) starts trading on 3-for-1 split-adjusted basis
feed.summary: Braiin Limited initiated a three-for-one forward stock split, with shares trading on a split-adjusted basis from April 29, 2026. This split aims to lower the per-share trading price, making the stock more accessible to retail investors, without altering the company's market capitalization or shareholders' proportional ownership. Shareholders of record by April 27, 2026, received two additional shares for each one held.

feed.title: A Look at Baidu Inc (BIDU) After 4.6% Gain -- GF Value $108.46 v
feed.summary: Baidu Inc (BIDU) shares rose 4.6% to $126.53 on April 30, 2026, marking a 44.1% increase over the past year despite a 3.2% year-to-date decline. GuruFocus assesses BIDU as "Modestly Overvalued" with a GF Value of $108.46, indicating potential risk of correction. Despite its strong GF Score™ of 80/100, the company's P/E ratio is significantly above its historical median, and there has been no recent insider trading activity.

feed.title: BKHA SEC Filings - Black Hawk Acquisition Corp 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of Black Hawk Acquisition Corp (BKHA) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, available on Stock Titan. It details several key filings, such as the proposed merger with Vesicor Therapeutics, extension payments to the trust account, notifications of late filings, and insider ownership disclosures. The platform also offers AI-powered summaries and sentiment analysis for each document to aid investor understanding.

feed.title: Transcript : Broadstone Net Lease, Inc., Q1 2026 Earnings Call, Apr 30, 2026
feed.summary: This article provides the transcript for Broadstone Net Lease, Inc.'s First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call held on April 30, 2026. Prior to the call summary, the article highlights recent news regarding Broadstone Net Lease, including their Q1 2026 adjusted FFO and revenue performance, as well as analyst rating updates. Access to the full transcript is reserved for subscribers.

feed.title: HIMS vs. TDOC: Which Digital Health Stock Offers Better Upside Now?
feed.summary: This article compares Hims & Hers Health (HIMS) and Teladoc Health (TDOC), two digital health companies with distinct business models, to determine which offers better upside potential. HIMS focuses on consumer-centric telehealth and personalized treatments, while TDOC provides a comprehensive virtual care platform for employers and health systems. Despite TDOC's recent stock outperformance, the analysis suggests HIMS currently offers relatively better upside due to its growth trajectory and favorable risk-reward balance.

feed.title: Tempus AI (TEM) CEO’s entities sell 166,250 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Tempus AI (TEM) CEO Eric Lefkofsky's entities, Blue Media, LLC and Gray Media, LLC, indirectly sold a total of 166,250 shares of Class A Common Stock. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in March 2025, with weighted-average prices around $51 per share. Despite these sales, Lefkofsky maintains significant indirect and direct holdings in the company.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (WBS) reports 5.27% beneficial stake in Webster Financial
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, reporting a 5.27% beneficial ownership stake in Webster Financial Corp (WBS) as of March 31, 2026. This stake amounts to 8,500,523 shares, with Vanguard exercising sole voting power over 1,237,816 shares and sole dispositive power over all 8,500,523 shares. The filing indicates these holdings include shares managed across Vanguard's various funds and accounts.

feed.title: BGM Group Warned by Nasdaq Over Minimum Bid Price Compliance
feed.summary: BGM Group (BGM) received a notification from Nasdaq on April 24, 2026, stating that its Class A shares have fallen below the $1.00 minimum bid price for 30 consecutive trading days, leading to non-compliance with Nasdaq's listing standards. The company has a 180-day period, until October 21, 2026, to regain compliance by having its share price close at or above $1.00 for ten consecutive business days, or it risks potential delisting from Nasdaq. BGM is monitoring its stock and considering options, including a reverse stock split, to address the issue.

feed.title: Tiptree Amends Fortegra Sale Agreement and Updates Outlook
feed.summary: Tiptree Inc. (TIPT) has amended its $1.65 billion agreement with DB Insurance for the sale of Fortegra, removing a New York regulatory approval condition and instead requiring Fortegra to surrender its New York premium finance license. Alongside this, Tiptree reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, including share repurchases, a cash dividend, and increased pro-forma book value due to planned asset sales, signaling a strategic shift towards a more capital-rich balance sheet. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rated TIPT as Neutral, citing operating disruption but acknowledging the stronger balance sheet and positive corporate actions.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) to $230 from $220, maintaining an "overweight" rating, which suggests a 24.7% upside. This follows Verisk's Q1 earnings beat, where it surpassed EPS and revenue estimates, and announced a $2.5 billion share buyback and a $.50 quarterly dividend, despite slightly lower-than-expected FY-2026 EPS guidance. The consensus street view is a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $238.20.

feed.title: Equinix Price Target Raised to $1015.00/Share From $894.00 by Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for Equinix (EQIX) shares from $894.00 to $1015.00, suggesting a significant upside. This adjustment reflects the analyst's updated valuation of the company's prospects. Despite the price target increase, the "Buy" rating for Equinix was reiterated by the firm.

feed.title: [Form 4] PBF Energy Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: PBF Energy Inc. director Georganne Hodges reported insider trading activity on April 28, 2026. She received an award of 4,231 shares of Class A Common Stock as restricted stock, and 931 shares were disposed of to cover tax obligations at $41.37 per share. Following these transactions, Hodges directly owns 19,771 Class A shares, indicating a net increase in her equity position.

feed.title: August 2025 Recap | On The Margin

feed.title: Vista Gold: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Vista Gold Corp. (VGZ) reported a Q1 loss of $3.1 million, translating to 2 cents per share. This financial snapshot was generated by Automated Insights using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) Receives Average Rating of "Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) has received an average "Buy" rating from 39 brokerages, with an average one-year price target of $362.73. This positive sentiment follows strong Q1 earnings, where Alphabet exceeded EPS and revenue expectations, and Google Cloud demonstrated significant growth and a substantial backlog. Despite strong financial performance and shareholder returns, the company faces potential risks from increased capital expenditure plans and ongoing regulatory probes in Europe and Brazil.

feed.title: CDW Corporation (NASDAQ:CDW) Given Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: CDW Corporation (NASDAQ:CDW) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from eight research firms, with an average 12-month price target of $160.43. The company recently surpassed earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.57 and revenue of $5.51 billion, showing a 6.3% year-over-year increase. CDW also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.63, reflecting an annualized yield of approximately 1.8%.

feed.title: Benchmark Electronics (BHE) Margin Compression Challenges Bullish High P/E Narrative In Q1 2026
feed.summary: Benchmark Electronics (BHE) reported Q1 2026 revenue of US$677.3 million and basic EPS of US$0.36, highlighting a challenge to the bullish high P/E narrative due to margin compression, with trailing net profit margins at 1.3% compared to 2% last year. Despite contract wins in AI, medical, and industrial sectors, the company's shares trade at a high P/E of 86x, significantly above its DCF fair value of US$32.06, suggesting that strong future execution on growth and profitability is already priced in. While analysts forecast 46% annual earnings growth, the current valuation and thin margins leave little room for disappointment and present a bear case.
